title: lichen_l2.c:1010 lichen_l2_enable missing initialization check
description: Contract violation: lichen_l2_enable() - Does not verify that link_ctx_initialized OR lichen_lora_l2_get_eui64() returns non-NULL before proceeding when state=true. The needs_reinit check at line 1034 catches ABORTED state, but if called before any init (UNINIT state), lichen_lora_l2_start() at line 1128 will fail with -EINVAL. The error is returned but the function could provide a more specific check. WHY: Clearer error handling before attempting start(). HOW to fix: Check lichen_lora_l2_get_eui64() != NULL before re-registering callback at line 1113.
close_reason: Added pre-start LoRa L2 availability check in lichen_l2_enable(true) using copy_eui64 and verified with focused object and full T-Echo build
